pure alternating origin e₀ rim = Cantor set of ends

Paste an exact matrix in U₃(ℤ[ω,1/3])

3 lines × 3 entries (comma or space separated); entries like 0, w, (1+2w)/3. Membership is validated exactly by the engine — one exact test.
